name: Frozen Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the juices in a very large container.
2. Add the pineapple to the mixture.
3. Cook the water and sugar until the sugar is fully dissolved, then add it to the juice.
4. Stir everything well and freeze.
5. To serve, thaw the mixture to a slush consistency.
6. Add the Orange sherbet and 7 Up, then whisk until combined.
